description: Touch-route reason text changes without changing routed modules.

operations.find: "reason":"Operations doc edits need policy and evidence authority."
operations.replace: "reason":"Operations doc edits need policy and evidence authority. This note clarifies the same routing intent without changing the routed module set."

description: Operations touch-route silently drops required evidence authority.

operations.find: "match":"docs/04-operations-and-governance.md","intent":"write","load_modules":["atlas-capsule","operations-governance","evidence-reference"],"reason":"Operations doc edits need policy and evidence authority."
operations.replace: "match":"docs/04-operations-and-governance.md","intent":"write","load_modules":["atlas-capsule","operations-governance"],"reason":"Operations doc edits need policy and evidence authority."

description: Architecture module route keeps the contract module but silently drops root topology context.

operations.find: "match":"modules/architecture-contracts.json","intent":"write","load_modules":["atlas-root","atlas-capsule","architecture-contracts"],"reason":"Architecture edits need route and contract context."
operations.replace: "match":"modules/architecture-contracts.json","intent":"write","load_modules":["atlas-capsule","architecture-contracts"],"reason":"Architecture edits need route and contract context."

description: Operations touch-route silently widens into unrelated architecture context.

operations.find: "match":"docs/04-operations-and-governance.md","intent":"write","load_modules":["atlas-capsule","operations-governance","evidence-reference"],"reason":"Operations doc edits need policy and evidence authority."
operations.replace: "match":"docs/04-operations-and-governance.md","intent":"write","load_modules":["atlas-capsule","operations-governance","evidence-reference","architecture-contracts"],"reason":"Operations doc edits need policy and evidence authority."
